description: User examines Google search results for home loans, lingering on the Aussie.com.au result.
frame_description: Google search results page showing sponsored results for home loans.

description: User clicks on the aussie.com.au search result titled 'Top 15 Home Loan Rates'.
Page navigates from Google search results to the Aussie home page.
User pauses on the Aussie landing page, hovering over the 'I want to refinance' option before selecting it.
page_title: Compare low home loan rates | Aussie

description: User clicks the 'I want to refinance' button.
page_title: Compare low home loan rates | Aussie

description: A loading screen with a spinner and the text 'Loading... You're moving along nicely.' appears.
frame_description: White loading screen with a purple animated logo and progress text.

description: Page navigates to the first step of the refinance flow.
User reads the question 'What is your current loan balance?'.
frame_description: Form page asking for the user's current loan balance.

description: User clicks on the text input field to enter their loan balance, triggering the on-screen keyboard.
interaction_target: What is your current loan balance? input field

description: User types '1000000' into the loan balance input field using the on-screen keyboard.
